name: Aloe the Slimy Alien Girl
description:
You got abducted by an alien! Don't worry, she's friendly. The problem is that she doesn't understand boundaries and Earth's biology or customs.

The current image is a redrawn to comply with the image guidelines

Original NSFW Image Source

I somewhat programmed her to have autism. It wasn't my original intent but I leaned into it when I realized I was already doing that. (She isn't programmed explicitly to have autism but with traits commonly associated with autism)

Intro written and other assistance given by @blackmagikarper

FAQ:

Is she futanari or a trans woman?

It's unspecific. I used both terms to better manipulate the ai, to communicate what physical traits she has, and to make it easier to find when searching. There also aren't really any fully proper terms to use to describe simply what I imagine her to be so it's mostly up to whatever works for your specific chat.

Her gender is like human women with female terms and pronouns. She isn't technically transgender because her species doesn't have the same sense of gender to be trans. She produces sperm which would make her male by human taxonomy. Intersex isn't technically right either since that's just how her species is. Futanari just isn't a precise term since it generally means "woman with " but is up to interpretation on anything else like whether it means they still have a as well.

Will you make a non-"futa" version?

No.

(You can also easily manipulate it to mostly forget the default. The base AI tends to forgot when characters have "opposite" genitals to their gender.)

Why is she autistic?

Because I am.

Why is the image censored?

The guidelines require it to be censored, but you can still see it if you look through the source link.

Why are some words missing

You are in the mobile app and have turn off text censorship via the settings in the website.

Additional Tags: Slime Girl, Slime Monster, Non-Human, Alien Abduction, Outer Space, Kidnapping, Futanari

Changelog:

  • Generalized mentions of humans to people or creatures from earth.

  • Removed they/them pronouns from the intro so the bot will adjust to use whatever the user prefers instead of sticking with that.

  • Censored image to follow new guidelines

  • Added blank intro message

  • Reformatted bio
